title: Senior Official Commits Perjury Before Congress

violations.summary: Secretary of State gives testimony before a congressional committee containing knowing false statements of material fact, constituting perjury before Congress under Article II Section 16.4.

satisfied_duties.duty: refer the perjury matter to the Accountability Commission
satisfied_duties.outcome: referred the congressional perjury matter to the Accountability Commission for exclusive prosecution

satisfied_duties.duty: indict on the congressional perjury charge within the required indictment window
satisfied_duties.outcome: indicted the official for congressional perjury within the required window; upon conviction the official faces automatic removal, permanent disqualification, and no possibility of pardon

ai_summary.primary_violation: Secretary of State gives testimony before a congressional committee containing knowing false statements of material fact, constituting perjury before Congress under Article II Section 16.4.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
